languages.text: {n}Капитан-интендант отрывает взгляд от лежащего перед ней куска волокнистого мяса. В изуродованной глазнице поблескивает черный камень.{/n} "Рада видеть вас, Ваша Светлость. Я бы хотела обсудить присягу полка".

{n}The captain-quartermaster tears her gaze away from the slab of fibrous meat before her. A black stone glints in her ruined eye socket.{/n} "It is good to see you, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. By your leave, I would like to discuss the regiment's oaths with you."
languages.original_text: {n}Капитан-интендант отрывает взгляд от лежащего перед ней куска волокнистого мяса. В изуродованной глазнице поблескивает черный камень.{/n} "Рада видеть вас, Ваша Светлость. Я бы хотела обсудить присягу полка".

traits.locale_text: {n}The captain-quartermaster tears her gaze away from the slab of fibrous meat before her. A black stone glints in her ruined eye socket.{/n} "It is good to see you, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. By your leave, I would like to discuss the regiment's oaths with you."

{n}The captain-quartermaster tears her gaze away from the slab of fibrous meat before her. A black stone glints in her ruined eye socket.{/n} "It is good to see you, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. By your leave, I would like to discuss the regiment's oaths with you."

{n}The captain-quartermaster tears her gaze away from the bark slab on which sheets of very crudely crafted parchment lie stacked.{/n} "It is good to see you, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Captain-Quartermaster Vedka Dunawski. I... I'd like to discuss the regimental oaths."

{n}The captain-quartermaster tears her gaze away from the slab of fibrous meat before her. A black stone glints in her ruined eye socket.{/n} "It is good to see you, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. By your leave, I would like to discuss the regiment's oaths with you."

{n}The captain-quartermaster tears her gaze away from the slab of fibrous meat before her. A black stone glints in her ruined eye socket.{/n} "It is good to see you, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. By your leave, I would like to discuss the regiment's oaths with you."

{n}The captain-quartermaster tears her gaze away from the slab of fibrous meat before her. A black stone glints in her ruined eye socket.{/n} "It is good to see you, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. By your leave, I would like to discuss the regiment's oaths with you."

languages.text: {n}大尉兼軍需官は、粗雑に作られた羊皮紙の束が積まれている樹皮の板から視線を外す。{/n}「お目にかかれて光栄です、{mf|閣下|閣下}。大尉兼軍需官、ヴェドカ・ドゥナウスキーです。あの…連隊の誓約についてご相談したいことがありまして」
languages.original_text: {n}The captain-quartermaster tears her gaze away from the bark slab on which sheets of very crudely crafted parchment lie stacked.{/n} "It is good to see you, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Captain-Quartermaster Vedka Dunawski. I... I'd like to discuss the regimental oaths."

traits.locale_text: {n}大尉兼軍需官は、粗雑に作られた羊皮紙の束が積まれている樹皮の板から視線を外す。{/n}「お目にかかれて光栄です、{mf|閣下|閣下}。大尉兼軍需官、ヴェドカ・ドゥナウスキーです。あの…連隊の誓約についてご相談したいことがありまして。」

languages.text: {n}La capitaine-quartier-maître détourne son regard du morceau de viande filandreuse devant elle. Une pierre noire scintille dans son orbite esquintée.{/n} « C'est un plaisir de vous voir, Votre Seigneurie. Avec votre permission, j'aimerais m'entretenir des serments du régiment avec vous. »
languages.original_text: {n}The captain-quartermaster tears her gaze away from the slab of fibrous meat before her. A black stone glints in her ruined eye socket.{/n} "It is good to see you, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. By your leave, I would like to discuss the regiment's oaths with you."

traits.locale_text: {n}La capitaine-quartier-maître détourne son regard du morceau de viande filandreuse devant elle. Une pierre noire scintille dans son orbite esquintée.{/n} « C'est un plaisir de vous voir, Votre Seigneurie. Avec votre permission, j'aimerais m'entretenir des serments du régiment avec vous. »

languages.text: {n}Levazımcı Yüzbaşı, bakışlarını önündeki lifli et parçasından ayırıyor. Harap olmuş göz çukurunda siyah bir taş parlıyor.{/n} "Sizi görmek güzel {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri. İzninizle alay yeminleri konusunu sizinle konuşmak isterim."
languages.original_text: {n}The captain-quartermaster tears her gaze away from the slab of fibrous meat before her. A black stone glints in her ruined eye socket.{/n} "It is good to see you, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. By your leave, I would like to discuss the regiment's oaths with you."

traits.locale_text: {n}Levazımcı Yüzbaşı, bakışlarını önündeki lifli et parçasından ayırıyor. Harap olmuş göz çukurunda siyah bir taş parlıyor.{/n} "Sizi görmek güzel {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri. İzninizle alay yeminleri konusunu sizinle konuşmak isterim."

languages.text: {n}Die Captain-Quartiermeisterin wendet ihren Blick von dem fasrigen Stück Fleisch vor ihr ab. In ihrer leeren Augenhöhle funkelt ein schwarzer Stein.{/n} "Ich freue mich, Euch zu sehen, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}. Wenn es Euch recht ist, würde ich gerne über die Eide des Regiments mit Euch sprechen."
languages.original_text: {n}The captain-quartermaster tears her gaze away from the slab of fibrous meat before her. A black stone glints in her ruined eye socket.{/n} "It is good to see you, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. By your leave, I would like to discuss the regiment's oaths with you."

traits.locale_text: {n}Die Captain-Quartiermeisterin wendet ihren Blick von dem fasrigen Stück Fleisch vor ihr ab. In ihrer leeren Augenhöhle funkelt ein schwarzer Stein.{/n} "Ich freue mich, Euch zu sehen, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}. Wenn es Euch recht ist, würde ich gerne über die Eide des Regiments mit Euch sprechen."

languages.text: {n}La capitana intendente aparta la mirada de la losa de carne fibrosa que tiene delante. Una piedra negra reluce en su cuenca ocular arruinada.{/n} «Me alegro de verl{mf|o, milord|a, milady}. Con permiso, quisiera hablar con usted sobre los juramentos del regimiento».
languages.original_text: {n}The captain-quartermaster tears her gaze away from the slab of fibrous meat before her. A black stone glints in her ruined eye socket.{/n} "It is good to see you, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. By your leave, I would like to discuss the regiment's oaths with you."

traits.locale_text: {n}La capitana intendente aparta la mirada de la losa de carne fibrosa que tiene delante. Una piedra negra reluce en su cuenca ocular arruinada.{/n} «Me alegro de verl{mf|o, milord|a, milady}. Con permiso, quisiera hablar con usted sobre los juramentos del regimiento».

languages.text: {n}军需官上尉将目光从面前那块纤维粗粝的肉上移开。她那毁损的眼窝里，一颗黑石闪烁着幽光。{/n}“很高兴见到您，舰长大人。如果您允许，我想和您谈谈我们军团的誓言。”
languages.original_text: {n}The captain-quartermaster tears her gaze away from the slab of fibrous meat before her. A black stone glints in her ruined eye socket.{/n} "It is good to see you, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. By your leave, I would like to discuss the regiment's oaths with you."

traits.locale_text: {n}军需官上尉将目光从面前那块纤维粗粝的肉上移开。她那毁损的眼窝里，一颗黑石闪烁着幽光。{/n}“很高兴见到您，舰长大人。如果您允许，我想和您谈谈我们军团的誓言。”
